info.name: LEAD-93 v1 As-Is - Full Fail-Fast Lifecycle Run (17 Endpoints)
info.description: Runs four independent v1 queries first, then an isolated Template lifecycle. The first request or assertion failure stops the dependency workflow; the runner subsequently executes only the Cleanup folder with exported runtime IDs.

item.name: 01 Independent Queries
item.description: Read-only requests with no dependency on test data. Run before any write operation.

request.description: Existing channel lookup.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

request.description: Existing query-object endpoint.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

request.description: Read-only recipient lookup.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

request.description: Exact QA Published tab request captured from the current web application.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

item.name: 02 Dependency Workflow
item.description: Creates one isolated Template and verifies the existing v1 Draft, Publish, Version and status lifecycle in strict order.

request.description: Creates a temporary V1 Draft. Set enableWriteTests=true. Capture returned emailCode.

body.raw:
{ "moduleCode": "COMMUNICATION", "moduleCodeName": "Communications", "scenarioCode": "TEMPLATE_LIBRARY", "emailName": "{{testEmailName}}", "description": "Temporary Postman API test draft", "effectiveWay": 0, "effectiveFrom": null, "effectiveUntil": null, "title": "LEAD-93 Postman API test", "editMode": "HTML", "emailContent": "

LEAD-93 Postman API test

", "textContent": "LEAD-93 Postman API test", "fileKeys": "", "emailContentKey": "", "isDraft": "1", "version": "V1", "thumbnailKey": null, "channelMap": {}, "isCustomBranding": "0", "isCampaign": 0 }

exec: console.warn('Full lifecycle write skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
if (json.data && json.data.emailCode) { pm.environment.set('testEmailCode', String(json.data.emailCode)); pm.environment.set('activeVersion', String(json.data.version || 'V1')); }

request.description: Set emailCode and activeVersion to a real template/version.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

item.name: 20 Verify V2 Active and V1 Expired

request.description: Paginated version history.

item.name: 21 Verify Active Version Delete Is Rejected

request.description: Deletes only a non-published Draft version. V1 and Active versions are rejected.

exec: console.warn('Full lifecycle write skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true.');
console.warn('Skipped because testEmailCode was not created by this run.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Published version deletion is rejected', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).to.eql('10000121'); });

item.name: 99 Cleanup
item.description: Soft-deletes only the Template created by this run, then verifies that it is no longer returned.

request.description: Cleanup request. Soft-deletes selected template; verify emailCode before sending.

exec: console.warn('Cleanup skipped because this run did not create a test template.');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

request.description: Verifies that the isolated v1 test Template is no longer returned after soft deletion.

exec: pm.test('Deleted temporary Template is not returned', function () { pm.expect(rows.some(item => String(item.emailCode) === String(pm.environment.get('testEmailCode')))).to.eql(false); });
